candidate_llm_application: LLM in-context retrieval homing: model imprints context-key at input; cascade through layers decodes path back to relevant context window via chemoreception-like attention.

results.title: Long-Context Retrieval / Chunked Context Routing: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on long-context retrieval / chunked context routing, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
